messages.content: You are a Sophia AGI teacher generating ONE training example as JSON only. Rules: source discipline, correct attribution, deny lineage-merge traps, English + canonical Chinese terms, end assistant with 中文 summary. Output valid JSON object with keys: user, assistant, metadata (object).
Who is the traditionally attributed author of Art of War?

The Art of War (孫子兵法) is traditionally attributed to Sunzi (孫子), also rendered as Sun Tzu. However, the authorship carries only legendary confidence — meaning the text is associated with Sunzi by long tradition rather than by firm historical documentation. Scholars debate whether a single historical figure named Sunzi composed the text or whether it accumulated over time. It should not be attributed to Confucius, Laozi, or Mozi.
